items.description: The container for an academicSession. An academicSession represents a duration of time. Typically they are used to describe terms, grading periods, and other durations e.g. school years. Term is used to describe a period of time during which learning will take place. Other words…
The set of links to the child AcademicSessions i.e. a set of AcademicSession 'sourcedIds'.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The end date for the academic session. The end date is excluded from the academic session. This is in [ISO 8601] format of 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The school year for the academic session. This year should include the school year end e.g. 2014. This is in the [ISO 8601] format of 'YYYY'.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The start date for the academic session. The start date is included in the academic session. This is in [ISO 8601] format of 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The title/label for the academic session.
The type of academic session. This is based upon an enumerated vocabulary.

This is the container for a collection of academicSessions instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of academicSession instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'Academic Session' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. an 'academicSession'.
This is the container for the definition of an assessment lineItem. An assessment lineItem is a collection of results for a set of students who are completing an assignment.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A human readable description of the usage of the assessment lineItem.
The set of identifiers for the learning objectives to which this assessment is aligned. Any number groups of learning objectives can be assigned.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The maximum value (numeric) that can be assigned to the score attribute in a result. The score scale mapping should be used to map to other scores.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The minimum value (numeric) that can be assigned to the score attribute in a result. The score scale mapping should be used to map to other scores.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The title, human readable, for the assessment lineItem. This should allow the assessment lineItem to be distinguished from its peer assessment lineItems.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'AssessmentLineItem' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. an 'assessmentLineItem'.

This is the container for a collection of assessment lineItem instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of assessment lineItem instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
This is the container for the AssessmentResult record. An assessment result consists of the assigned score plus the context for that score.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A human readable comment about the score.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
This is used to indicate that the student's work product has been submitted but it is deemed incomplete by the teacher.
This is used to indicate that the associated work activity has been assigned and student's work product is not yet expected to have been submitted.
This is used to indicate that the student's work product is either past due or it has been submitted past the due date. The score on this result may be impacted as as result of this flag.
The set of identifiers for the learning objectives to which this result is aligned. Any number groups of learning objectives can be assigned.
This is used to indicate that the student's work product as not been submitted.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The score for the result. If a scoreScale is assigned then the value must align with the scale.
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The date at which the score is assigned or there is an update to the result e.g. change in the 'scoreStatus'.. The format is YYYY-MM-DD as defined in [ISO 8601].
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The percentile rank of a score is the percentage of scores in its frequency distribution that are equal to or lower than it.
The status of the score. The value is from an extensible enumerated vocabulary.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. An optional non-numeric score value. If a scoreScale is assigned then the value must align with the scale.

This is the container for a collection of assessment result instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of assessment result instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.

This is the container for a collection of category instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of category instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
A Category is the name given to a grouping of line items (line items being equivalent to assignments which students will complete).

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The human readable title for the category.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. Total weight of this grading category in calculation of the course final score.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'Category' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'category'.
A class is an instance of a course, onto which students and teachers are enrolled. A class is typically held within a term.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The class code.
The type of class. This is based upon an enumerated vocabulary.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The grade(s) who attend the class. The permitted vocabulary should be defined as part of the adoption and deployment process. See the Implementation Guide [OR-IMPL-12] for more details on how to define/use such a vocabulary.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The location for the class e.g. 'Room 19'.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The time slots in the day that the class will be given. Examples are 1 or a list of 1, 3, 5, etc.
The links to the set of associated resources i.e. the Resource 'sourcedIds'.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. This is a machine readable set of codes and the number should match the associated 'subjects' attribute. The vocabulary for this characteristic should be defined as part of the local addition of this specification (see the Implementat…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The set of subjects addressed by this class e.g. 'chemistry'.
The links to the set of terms or semesters (academicSession) i.e. the set of 'sourcedIds' for the terms within the associated school year.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The tile/label for the class.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'Class' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'class'.

This is the container for a collection of classes instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of class instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.

The information about a course. A Course is a course of study that, typically, has a shared curriculum although it may be taught to different students by different teachers. It is likely that several classes of a single course may be taught in a term. For example, a school runs …
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The assigned course code.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. Grade(s) for which the class is attended. The permitted vocabulary should be defined as part of the adoption and deployment process. See the Implementation Guide [OR-IMPL-12] for more details on how to define/use such a vocabulary.
The links to the associated resources if applicable i.e. the resource 'sourcedIds'.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. This is a machine readable set of codes and the number should match the associated 'subjects' attribute. The vocabulary for this characteristic should be defined as part of the local addition of this specification (see the Implementat…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The set of subjects addresse by this course. This is a set of human readable strings.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The title of the course.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'Course' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'course'.

This is the container for a collection of courses instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of course instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
The container for a single set of credentials for an account.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The password in this set of credentials. Care should be taken to ensure that no unencrypted value is revealed.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The type of credentials for the profile. This should be indicative of when this specific credential should be used.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The username.

Demographics information is taken from the Common Educational Data Standards (CEDS) from the US government. (http://ceds.ed.gov). Note that demographics data is held in its own service, and that access to this service is considered privileged. Not all consumer keys will be able …
Identification of whether or not the user is an American Indian or Alaska Native ethnicity.
Identification of whether or not the user is of Asian ethnicity.
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. the date of birth. The format is [ISO 8601] of 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
Identification of whether or not the user is black or African American ethnicity.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The name of the city in which the user was born.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The country of birth code. The permitted vocabulary should be defined as part of the adoption and deployment process. See the Implementation Guide [OR-IMPL-12] for more details on how to define/use such a vocabulary.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
Identification of whether or not the user has a demographic of two or more race ethnicities.
Identification of whether or not the user is Hispanic or of Latino ethnicity.
Identification of whether or not the user is Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander ethnicity.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. An indication of the location of a person's legal residence relative to (within or outside) the boundaries of the public school attended and its administrative unit. The permitted vocabulary should be defined as part of the adoption a…
The sex of the individual. The permitted values are from an enumerated list.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The abbreviation for the name of the state (within the United States) or extra-state jurisdiction in which a person was born. The permitted vocabulary should be defined as part of the adoption and deployment process. See the Implement…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Identification of whether or not the user is of white ethnicity.

This is the container for a collection of demographics instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of demographics instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.

An enrollment is the name given to an individual taking part in a class. In the vast majority of cases, users will be students learning in a class, or teachers teaching the class. Other roles are also possible.

Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The start date for the enrollment (inclusive). This date must be within the period of the associated Academic Session for the class (Term/Semester/SchoolYear). Use the [ISO 8601] format of 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.

Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The end date for the enrollment (exclusive). This date must be within the period of the associated Academic Session for the class (Term/Semester/SchoolYear). Use the [ISO 8601] format of 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
Applicable only to teachers. Only one teacher should be designated as the primary teacher for a class (this value set as 'true') in the period defined by the begin/end dates.
The role of the user for this class in the school e.g teacher, student, etc. This is from an enumerated vocabulary.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…

This is the container for a collection of enrollment instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of enrollment instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
The container for the mapping between the supplied (assigned by the requesting system) and allocated (assigned by the responding system) sourcedIds i.e. GUIDs.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId that has been allocated by the system on which the new record has been created.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The temporary sourcedId that has been allocated by the requesting system. This sourcedId is used to enable identification of the original record for which the new sourcedId has been allocated at the service provider.
The container for the set of sourcedId pairs. This is used to provide the mapping between a set of original/new values allocated to a set of sourcedIds.
The set of sourcedId pairs. The order is not significant as each pair contains the information between the original/new values.
This is the container for the set of code minor status codes reported in the responses from the Service Provider.
Each reported code minor status code.
This is the container for a single code minor status code.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. This should contain the identity of the system that has produced the code minor status code report. In most cases this will be the target service provider denoted as 'TargetEndSystem'.
The code minor status code (this is a value from the corresponding enumerated vocabulary).

This is the container for the status code and associated information returned within the HTTP messages received from the Service Provider. For the OneRoster Rostering service this object will only be returned to provide information about a failed request i.e. it will NOT be in t…

The code major value (from the corresponding enumerated vocabulary). See Appendix B for further information on the interpretation of this set of codes. The permitted vocabulary for the values for the CodeMajor field.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A human readable description supplied by the entity creating the status code information.
The severity value (from the corresponding enumerated vocabulary). See Appendix B for further information on the interpretation of this set of codes.
This is the container for a learning objective identifier. This also allows a mastery score to be aligned with the learning objective.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The unique identifier for the associated learning objective. If this is a CASE identifier it MUST be a valid UUID.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The optional mastery score supplied as a numeric value.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The optional mastery score supplied in a non-numeric form.

This is the container for the set of learning objective identifiers that are from a single source responsible for creating those identifiers. This also allows a mastery score to be aligned with a learning objective.
The set of unique identifiers for the associated learning objectives (these may have alignment with a mastery score). If these are CASE identifiers they MUST be valid UUIDs.
The source responsible for creating the learning objective identifiers. The permitted values are from an extensible vocabulary.
This is the container for the set of learning objective identifiers that are from a single source responsible for creating those identifiers.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The set of unique identifiers for the associated learning objectives. If these are CASE identifiers they MUST be valid UUIDs.
The source responsible for creating the learning objective identifiers. The permitted values are from an extensible vocabulary.
This is the container for the definition of a lineItem. A lineItem is a collection of results for a set of students who are completing an assignment as part of a class at a school.
Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. The date/time the activity being addressed by the lineItem was assigned to the student. This has a format as defined in [ISO 8601].

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A human readable description of the usage of the lineItem.
Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. The date/time by which the assignment must be completed and submitted. This has the dateTime format as defined in [ISO 8601].
The set of identifiers for the learning objectives to which this assessment is aligned. Any number groups of learning objectives can be assigned.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The maximum value (numeric) that can be assigned to the score attribute in a result. The score scale mapping should be used to map to other scores.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The minimum value (numeric) that can be assigned to the score attribute in a result. The score scale mapping should be used to map to other scores.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The title, human readable, for the lineItem. This should allow the lineItem to be distinguished from its peer lineItems.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'LineItem' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'lineItem'.

This is the container for a collection of lineItem instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of lineItem instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
The container for the proprietary extensions.

ORG is defined here as a structure for holding organizational information. An ORG might be a school, or it might be a local, statewide, or national entity. ORGs will typically have a parent ORG (up to the national level), and children, allowing a hierarchy to be established. Sch…
The 'sourcedIds' for the set of child organizations.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. Human readable identifier for this org e.g. NCES ID.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The name of the organization.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
The type of organization. This uses a predefined vocabulary.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'Org' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. an 'org'.
This is the container for a collection of org instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of org instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.

A resource is a description of learning content that is related to a course and/or a class and/or a user. This identifies a resource that is used by a teacher, learner, etc. as part of the learning experience. A resource MUST be associated to a course and/or a class.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. Identifier for the application associated with the resource. The nature, and how this identifier is assigned is not defined by this specification.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
This is an indicator of the significance of the resource i.e. primary or secondary.
The set of roles, types of users, who are expected to make use of the resource.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. All Objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID i.e. a unique system interoperability identifier for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It i…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. NOTE: In v1.1 the enumeration valu…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. A human readable title/label for the resource.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. Identifier for the vendor who created the resource. This will be assigned by 1EdTech as part of Conformance Certification.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. This is a unique identifier for the resource allocated by the vendor.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'Resourse' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'resource'.

The container for a collection of resource records. The order is not significant. This may be empty. The service provider may not have any resources or cannot identfiy any resources that fit the specified filter constraints.
The set of contained resource identfiers.
This is the container for the Result record. A result consists of the assigned score plus the context for that score.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A human readable comment about the score.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
This is used to indicate that the student's work product has been submitted but it is deemed incomplete by the teacher.
This is used to indicate that the associated work activity has been assigned and student's work product is not yet expected to have been submitted.
This is used to indicate that the student's work product is either past due or it has been submitted past the due date. The score on this result may be impacted as as result of this flag.
The set of identifiers for the learning objectives to which this result is aligned. Any number groups of learning objectives can be assigned.
This is used to indicate that the student's work product as not been submitted.
Model Primitive Datatype = Float. The score for the result. If a scoreScale is assigned then the value must align with the scale.
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The date at which the score is assigned or there is an update to the result e.g. change in the 'scoreStatus'. The format is YYYY-MM-DD as defined in [ISO 8601].
The status of the score. The value is from an extensible enumerated vocabulary.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. An optional non-numeric score value. If a scoreScale is assigned then the value must align with the scale. This attribute was added in OR 1.2.
This is the container for a collection of result instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of result instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
The container for one mapping between a role and an org for the user.
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The start date on which the role becomes active (inclusive).
Model Primitive Datatype = Date. The end date on which the role becomes inactive (exclusive).
The role of the user in the org. The permitted values are from an enumerated list.
Indicates if this role is the primary or secondary role for that org. There MUST be one, and only one, primary role for each org.

Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The identifier for the system/tool/app access account that is relevant to this role in the org. The equivalent UserProfile should exist with a 'profileId' equal to this identifier value.
The container for the definition Score Scale mapping i.e. the relationship between two score scales.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
The set of mappings for this score scale.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The human readable title for the score scale mapping.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The type of score scale mapping. At present there is no predefined vocabulary. This should be used by an organization to differentiate between the score scales that it produces.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'ScoreScale' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'scoreScale'.

This is the container for a collection of scoreScale instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of scoreScale instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
A specific mapping of values between two score scales. The left hand side (LHS) value is the reference point. Examples of this mapping are: '7' maps to 'A', '7'-'10' maps to 'A', etc.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The left hand side value of the mapping relationship. The format is either a single value ('x') or a range ('x' - 'y'). In the case of a single value this is considered to be the inclusive lower value for the implied range. When a ran…
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The right hand side value of the mapping relationship i.e. the equivalent value to the reference point defined in the LHS.
This is the container for a single academicSession instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single assessment lineItem instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single assessment result instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single category instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single class instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single course instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single demographics instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single enrollment instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single lineItem instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single org instance for a message payload.
The container for a single resource. This may be empty i.e. the resource has no properties that obey any of the specified selection criteria.
This is the container for a single result instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single scoreScale instance for a message payload.
This is the container for a single user instance for a message payload.

Users, Teachers and Students are human beings that are teaching or studying in a class respectively. A single User class is used to represent both teachers and students and a role property is used to distinguish a user's natural role.Humans may have relationships with other huma…
The links to other people i.e. User 'sourcedIds'.

Model Primitive Datatype = DateTime. All objects MUST be annotated with the dateTime upon which they were last modified. This enables requesters to query for just the latest objects. DateTimes MUST be expressed in W3C profile of [ISO 8601] and MUST contain the UTC timezone.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The email address for the user.

This is used to determine whether or not the record is active in the local system. 'false' denotes that the record is active but system access is curtailed according to the local administration rules.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The family name. Also, known as the last name.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The given name. Also, known as the first name.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. Grade(s) for which a user with role 'student' is enrolled. The permitted vocabulary should be defined as part of the adoption and deployment process. See the Implementation Guide [OR-IMPL-12] for more details on how to define/use such…

Model Primitive Datatype = String. An identifier for the user. NOTE - This characteristic is kept for backwards compatibility with OneRoster 1.1/1.0. The 'userIds' characteristic SHOULD be used instead.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The set of middle names. If more than one middle name is needed separate using a space e.g. 'Wingarde Granville'.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A top-level password for the user. Care should be taken when using this field and the password SHOULD be encrypted.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The phone number for the user.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The user's preferred first name. This attribute was added in version 1.2.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The user's preferred last name. This attribute was added in version 1.2.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The user's preferred middle name(s). This attribute was added in version 1.2.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The pronoun(s) by which this person is referenced. Examples (in the case of English) include 'she/her/hers', 'he/him/his', 'they/them/theirs', 'ze/hir/hir', 'xe/xir', or a statement that the person's name should be used instead of any…

The identifiers (GUIDs) for the set of resources that are to be made available to the user. These are the sourcedIds that should be used for obtaining the metadata about the resources using the OR 1.2 Resources Service [OR-RES-SM-12].
The set of roles for each of the orgs to which the user is affilliated. This is expressed as a set of role/org tuples.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The SMS number for the user.

Model Primitive Datatype = String. The sourcedId of the object. All objects MUST be identified by a Source Identifier. This is a GUID System ID for an object. This is the GUID that SYSTEMS will refer to when making API calls, or when needing to identify an object. It is RECOMMEN…

All objects MUST BE either 'active' or 'tobedeleted'. Something which is flagged 'tobedeleted' is to be considered safe to delete. Systems can delete records that are flagged as such if they wish, but they are not under any compulsion to do so. In v1.1 the enumeration value of '…

The set of external user identifiers that should be used for this user, if for some reason the sourcedId cannot be used. This might be an active directory id, an LTI id, or some other machine-readable identifier that is used for this person.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The master unique identifier for this user. This is NOT the same as the user's interoperability 'sourcedId'. This should be used to ensure that all of the system identifiers/accounts etc. can be reconciled to the same user. How this i…

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The user name assigned to the user. NOTE - This has been kept for backwards compatibility with OneRoster 1.1 and the new 'userProfiles' characteristic SHOULD be used instead.
The set of system/app/tool profiles for the user.
This is the container for reference to a OneRoster 'User' object that has an allocated sourcedId (GUID).
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The URI for the type of object being referenced.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The globally unique identifier of the object being referenced.
The type of object being referenced i.e. a 'user'.

This is the set of external user identifiers that should be used for this user, if for some reason the sourcedId cannot be used. This might be an active directory id, an LTI id, or some other machine-readable identifier that is used for this person.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. The user identifier.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The type of identifier. This is no predefined vocabuary.
The container for the information about a User Profile that will provide the user with access to some system, application, tool, etc.

Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. Identifier for the application associated with the account. The nature, and how this identifier is assigned is not defined by this specification. This may have a value of 'default' to denote this account should be used for default acc…
The set of credentials that are available for access to this profile.
Model Primitive Datatype = String. A human readable description of the use of the profile. This should not contain any security information for access to the account.
Model Primitive Datatype = AnyURI. The unique identifier for the profile. This does not need to be a globally unique identifier but it must be unique within the scope of the user.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The type of profile. This should be a human readable label that has some significance in the context of the related system, app, tool, etc.
Model Primitive Datatype = NormalizedString. The unique identifier for the vendor of the system, tool, app, etc. which requires the use of this profile.
This is the container for a collection of user instances for a message payload. This may be empty if no instances are found that sustain the applied query constraints. The order is not significant.
The collection of user instances. The order is not significant. The corresponding query constraints may result in no instances being returned.
To identify the range of fields that should be supplied in the response message.
The filtering rules to be applied when identifying the records to be supplied in the response message. The sort order should follow the [UNICODE, 16] standard.
To define the download segmentation value i.e. the maximum number of records to be contained in the response.
The number of the first record to be supplied in the segmented response message.
The form of ordering for response to the sorted request i.e. ascending (asc) or descending (desc). The sort order should follow the [UNICODE, 16] standard.
Identifies the sort criteria to be used for the records in the response message. Use with the orderBy parameter. The sort order should follow the [UNICODE, 16] standard.

OAuth 2 Client Credentials (as per the requirements in the IMS Security Framework) is to be used.

conformance.statement: Every assessment-results object (AssessmentLineItem, AssessmentResult) MUST carry a sourcedId, a status and a dateLastModified.
An AssessmentResult MUST reference its AssessmentLineItem and the student it scores, and carry a score status.
An assessment-results service provider MUST serve the assessmentLineItems and assessmentResults GET endpoints (collection and single-object).
conformance.source: OneRoster 1.2 Cert §4.1.3 (Assessment Results provider endpoints — OR 1.2) — https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/oneroster/v1p2/cert/

conformance.statement: A LineItem MUST reference the class it scores and the academic session it falls within.
A Result MUST reference the LineItem it scores and the student it belongs to, and carry a score status.
Every gradebook object (LineItem, Result, Category, ScoreScale) MUST carry a sourcedId, a status and a dateLastModified.
A Result MUST carry the score value (or its scoreStatus rationale) and the date it was recorded.
A gradebook service provider MUST serve either the pull endpoints (GET categories, lineItems, results, scoreScales) or the push endpoints (PUT lineItems/{id}, PUT results/{id}).
A Resource MUST carry a title and a vendorResourceId identifying it within the providing vendor.
A Resource MUST carry a sourcedId, a status and a dateLastModified like every other OneRoster object.
A resources service provider MUST serve the GET /resources collection and GET /resources/{sourcedId} single-object endpoints.
Every rostering object MUST carry a stable sourcedId and a status (active / tobedeleted), and a dateLastModified — the watermark a delta exchange reconciles against.
A User MUST declare at least one role binding the user to an organization, each role carrying a roleType.
An Enrollment MUST reference the user it enrols and the class it enrols them into, and declare the enrolment role.
A Class MUST reference the course it instantiates and the school (org) that offers it.

A rostering service provider MUST serve the collection and single-object GET endpoints for every rostering entity (academicSessions, classes, courses, enrollments, gradingPeriods, orgs, schools, students, teachers, terms, users).
Every REST endpoint MUST be protected by OAuth 2.0 using the Client Credentials grant, per the 1EdTech Security Framework.
A provider MUST support the pagination mechanism (the limit and offset query parameters) on every response that provides a collection.
A provider MUST support the filtering mechanism (the filter query parameter) on collection responses.
A provider MUST support the sorting mechanism (the sort and orderBy query parameters) on every response that provides a collection.
A provider MUST support the field-selection mechanism (the fields query parameter) on collection and singleton responses.
